$comment: OpenClaw MCP server configuration for Baseflow solar plant agents.
$comment2: Merge these entries into your ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json under 'mcpServers'.

baseflow-solar-scada.description: Reads solar inverters, string combiners, energy meters, and battery via Modbus TCP / SunSpec. Supports inverter control commands.

baseflow-weather.description: 7-day weather and PV power forecasts from Open-Meteo and Forecast.Solar. Compares actual vs expected generation.

baseflow-alerts.description: Sends fault notices, performance alerts, and daily reports to operators via Telegram. Includes severity-based throttling.
